data.name: Start project service when it did run before

debug.msg: state of project service is {{ prj_service_state }}

data.shell:
if [ -d "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ] &&
   [ -d "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/." ] &&
   [ ! -h "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ];
then
  mv "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/"
  cd /home/prj/
  ln -s "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/{{ prj_user }}_root"
fi

data.name: Create log folder
data.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
setenv JAVA_HOME=%_OLD_JAVA_HOME%
setenv PATH=%_OLDPATH%
unset _OLD_JAVA_HOME
unset _OLDPATH
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl"
$fileContents[1392] = $fileContents[1392] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl" -Value $fileContents

block.win_shell: certbot certonly --standalone -d {{ hostname }} --server {{ tls_server }} --register-unsafely-without-email --cert-name {{ hostname_short }} --key-type rsa --agree-tos --force-renewal

block.name: Check that mod_ssl in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment mod_ssl in Apache config file
Uncomment rewrite_module in Apache config file
Uncomment socache_shmcb_module in Apache config file
Check that httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file
Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
RewriteEngine On
RewriteCond %{HTTPS} off
RewriteRule (.*) https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [R=301,L]
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf"
$fileContents[211] = $fileContents[211] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$webname = "{{ prj_user }}_root"
$rulename = $webname + ' HTTP to HTTPS'
$inbound = '(.*)'
$outbound = "https://{HTTP_HOST}{REQUEST_URI}"
$site = "IIS:\Sites\$webname"
$root = 'system.webServer/rewrite/rules'
$filter = "{0}/rule[@name='{1}']" -f $root, $rulename
$input = "{HTTPS}"
$pattern = "^OFF$"
#Match URL
Add-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter $root -name '.' -value @{name=$rulename; patterSyntax='Regular Expressions'; stopProcessing='True'}
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/match" -name 'url' -value $inbound
#Conditions -> Logical Grouping
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/conditions" -name '.' -value @{input=$input; matchType='0'; pattern=$pattern; ignoreCase='True'; negate='False'}
#Action
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'type' -value 'Redirect'
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'url' -value $outbound

data.name: Start project service when it did run before

debug.msg: state of project service is {{ prj_service_state }}

data.shell:
if [ -d "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ] &&
   [ -d "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/." ] &&
   [ ! -h "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ];
then
  mv "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/"
  cd /home/prj/
  ln -s "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/{{ prj_user }}_root"
fi

data.name: Create log folder
data.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
setenv JAVA_HOME=%_OLD_JAVA_HOME%
setenv PATH=%_OLDPATH%
unset _OLD_JAVA_HOME
unset _OLDPATH
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl"
$fileContents[1392] = $fileContents[1392] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Check that mod_ssl in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment mod_ssl in Apache config file
Uncomment rewrite_module in Apache config file
Uncomment socache_shmcb_module in Apache config file
Check that httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file
Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
RewriteEngine On
RewriteCond %{HTTPS} off
RewriteRule (.*) https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [R=301,L]
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf"
$fileContents[211] = $fileContents[211] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$webname = "{{ prj_user }}_root"
$rulename = $webname + ' HTTP to HTTPS'
$inbound = '(.*)'
$outbound = "https://{HTTP_HOST}{REQUEST_URI}"
$site = "IIS:\Sites\$webname"
$root = 'system.webServer/rewrite/rules'
$filter = "{0}/rule[@name='{1}']" -f $root, $rulename
$input = "{HTTPS}"
$pattern = "^OFF$"
#Match URL
Add-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter $root -name '.' -value @{name=$rulename; patterSyntax='Regular Expressions'; stopProcessing='True'}
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/match" -name 'url' -value $inbound
#Conditions -> Logical Grouping
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/conditions" -name '.' -value @{input=$input; matchType='0'; pattern=$pattern; ignoreCase='True'; negate='False'}
#Action
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'type' -value 'Redirect'
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'url' -value $outbound

data.name: Start project service when it did run before

debug.msg: state of project service is {{ prj_service_state }}

data.shell:
if [ -d "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ] &&
   [ -d "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/." ] &&
   [ ! -h "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ];
then
  mv "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/"
  cd /home/prj/
  ln -s "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/{{ prj_user }}_root"
fi

data.name: Create log folder
data.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
setenv JAVA_HOME=%_OLD_JAVA_HOME%
setenv PATH=%_OLDPATH%
unset _OLD_JAVA_HOME
unset _OLDPATH
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl"
$fileContents[1392] = $fileContents[1392] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Check that mod_ssl in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment mod_ssl in Apache config file
Uncomment rewrite_module in Apache config file
Uncomment socache_shmcb_module in Apache config file
Check that httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file
Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
RewriteEngine On
RewriteCond %{HTTPS} off
RewriteRule (.*) https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [R=301,L]
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf"
$fileContents[211] = $fileContents[211] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$webname = "{{ prj_user }}_root"
$rulename = $webname + ' HTTP to HTTPS'
$inbound = '(.*)'
$outbound = "https://{HTTP_HOST}{REQUEST_URI}"
$site = "IIS:\Sites\$webname"
$root = 'system.webServer/rewrite/rules'
$filter = "{0}/rule[@name='{1}']" -f $root, $rulename
$input = "{HTTPS}"
$pattern = "^OFF$"
#Match URL
Add-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter $root -name '.' -value @{name=$rulename; patterSyntax='Regular Expressions'; stopProcessing='True'}
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/match" -name 'url' -value $inbound
#Conditions -> Logical Grouping
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/conditions" -name '.' -value @{input=$input; matchType='0'; pattern=$pattern; ignoreCase='True'; negate='False'}
#Action
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'type' -value 'Redirect'
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'url' -value $outbound

data.name: Start project service when it did run before

debug.msg: state of project service is {{ prj_service_state }}

data.shell:
if [ -d "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ] &&
   [ -d "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/." ] &&
   [ ! -h "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ];
then
  mv "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/"
  cd /home/prj/
  ln -s "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/{{ prj_user }}_root"
fi

data.name: Create log folder
data.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
setenv JAVA_HOME=%_OLD_JAVA_HOME%
setenv PATH=%_OLDPATH%
unset _OLD_JAVA_HOME
unset _OLDPATH
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl"
$fileContents[1392] = $fileContents[1392] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Check that mod_ssl in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment mod_ssl in Apache config file
Uncomment rewrite_module in Apache config file
Uncomment socache_shmcb_module in Apache config file
Check that httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file
Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
RewriteEngine On
RewriteCond %{HTTPS} off
RewriteRule (.*) https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [R=301,L]
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf"
$fileContents[211] = $fileContents[211] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$webname = "{{ prj_user }}_root"
$rulename = $webname + ' HTTP to HTTPS'
$inbound = '(.*)'
$outbound = "https://{HTTP_HOST}{REQUEST_URI}"
$site = "IIS:\Sites\$webname"
$root = 'system.webServer/rewrite/rules'
$filter = "{0}/rule[@name='{1}']" -f $root, $rulename
$input = "{HTTPS}"
$pattern = "^OFF$"
#Match URL
Add-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter $root -name '.' -value @{name=$rulename; patterSyntax='Regular Expressions'; stopProcessing='True'}
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/match" -name 'url' -value $inbound
#Conditions -> Logical Grouping
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/conditions" -name '.' -value @{input=$input; matchType='0'; pattern=$pattern; ignoreCase='True'; negate='False'}
#Action
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'type' -value 'Redirect'
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'url' -value $outbound

data.shell:
if [ -d "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ] &&
   [ -d "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/." ] &&
   [ ! -h "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ];
then
  mv "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/"
  cd /home/prj/
  ln -s "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/{{ prj_user }}_root"
fi

data.name: Create log folder
data.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
setenv JAVA_HOME=%_OLD_JAVA_HOME%
setenv PATH=%_OLDPATH%
unset _OLD_JAVA_HOME
unset _OLDPATH
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl"
$fileContents[1392] = $fileContents[1392] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Check that mod_ssl in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment mod_ssl in Apache config file
Uncomment rewrite_module in Apache config file
Uncomment socache_shmcb_module in Apache config file
Check that httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file
Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
RewriteEngine On
RewriteCond %{HTTPS} off
RewriteRule (.*) https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [R=301,L]
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf"
$fileContents[211] = $fileContents[211] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$webname = "{{ prj_user }}_root"
$rulename = $webname + ' HTTP to HTTPS'
$inbound = '(.*)'
$outbound = "https://{HTTP_HOST}{REQUEST_URI}"
$site = "IIS:\Sites\$webname"
$root = 'system.webServer/rewrite/rules'
$filter = "{0}/rule[@name='{1}']" -f $root, $rulename
$input = "{HTTPS}"
$pattern = "^OFF$"
#Match URL
Add-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter $root -name '.' -value @{name=$rulename; patterSyntax='Regular Expressions'; stopProcessing='True'}
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/match" -name 'url' -value $inbound
#Conditions -> Logical Grouping
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/conditions" -name '.' -value @{input=$input; matchType='0'; pattern=$pattern; ignoreCase='True'; negate='False'}
#Action
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'type' -value 'Redirect'
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'url' -value $outbound

data.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
setenv JAVA_HOME=%_OLD_JAVA_HOME%
setenv PATH=%_OLDPATH%
unset _OLD_JAVA_HOME
unset _OLDPATH
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl"
$fileContents[1392] = $fileContents[1392] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Generate certificate
block.win_shell: certbot certonly --standalone -d {{ hostname }} --server {{ tls_server }} --register-unsafely-without-email --cert-name {{ hostname_short }} --key-type rsa --agree-tos --force-renewal

block.name: Check that mod_ssl in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment mod_ssl in Apache config file
Uncomment rewrite_module in Apache config file
Uncomment socache_shmcb_module in Apache config file
Check that httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file
Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
RewriteEngine On
RewriteCond %{HTTPS} off
RewriteRule (.*) https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [R=301,L]
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf"
$fileContents[211] = $fileContents[211] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$webname = "{{ prj_user }}_root"
$rulename = $webname + ' HTTP to HTTPS'
$inbound = '(.*)'
$outbound = "https://{HTTP_HOST}{REQUEST_URI}"
$site = "IIS:\Sites\$webname"
$root = 'system.webServer/rewrite/rules'
$filter = "{0}/rule[@name='{1}']" -f $root, $rulename
$input = "{HTTPS}"
$pattern = "^OFF$"
#Match URL
Add-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter $root -name '.' -value @{name=$rulename; patterSyntax='Regular Expressions'; stopProcessing='True'}
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/match" -name 'url' -value $inbound
#Conditions -> Logical Grouping
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/conditions" -name '.' -value @{input=$input; matchType='0'; pattern=$pattern; ignoreCase='True'; negate='False'}
#Action
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'type' -value 'Redirect'
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'url' -value $outbound

   [ -d "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/." ] &&
   [ ! -h "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ];

data.name: Create log folder
data.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
setenv JAVA_HOME=%_OLD_JAVA_HOME%
setenv PATH=%_OLDPATH%
unset _OLD_JAVA_HOME
unset _OLDPATH
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl"
$fileContents[1392] = $fileContents[1392] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Generate certificate
block.win_shell: certbot certonly --standalone -d {{ hostname }} --server {{ tls_server }} --register-unsafely-without-email --cert-name {{ hostname_short }} --key-type rsa --agree-tos --force-renewal

block.name: Check that mod_ssl in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment mod_ssl in Apache config file
Uncomment rewrite_module in Apache config file
Uncomment socache_shmcb_module in Apache config file
Check that httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file
Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
RewriteEngine On
RewriteCond %{HTTPS} off
RewriteRule (.*) https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [R=301,L]
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf"
$fileContents[211] = $fileContents[211] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$webname = "{{ prj_user }}_root"
$rulename = $webname + ' HTTP to HTTPS'
$inbound = '(.*)'
$outbound = "https://{HTTP_HOST}{REQUEST_URI}"
$site = "IIS:\Sites\$webname"
$root = 'system.webServer/rewrite/rules'
$filter = "{0}/rule[@name='{1}']" -f $root, $rulename
$input = "{HTTPS}"
$pattern = "^OFF$"
#Match URL
Add-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter $root -name '.' -value @{name=$rulename; patterSyntax='Regular Expressions'; stopProcessing='True'}
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/match" -name 'url' -value $inbound
#Conditions -> Logical Grouping
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/conditions" -name '.' -value @{input=$input; matchType='0'; pattern=$pattern; ignoreCase='True'; negate='False'}
#Action
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'type' -value 'Redirect'
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'url' -value $outbound

debug.msg: state of project service is {{ prj_service_state }}

data.shell:
if [ -d "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ] &&
   [ -d "/mnt/{{ prj_user }}/." ] &&
   [ ! -h "/home/prj/{{ prj_user }}_root" ];
then

$contentToAdd = @"
setenv JAVA_HOME=%_OLD_JAVA_HOME%
setenv PATH=%_OLDPATH%
unset _OLD_JAVA_HOME
unset _OLDPATH
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl"
$fileContents[1392] = $fileContents[1392] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "{{ prj_home_win }}\\src\\cfg\\scheduler\\PSIScheduler{{ server_role }}.ctl" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Generate certificate

block.name: Check that mod_ssl in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment mod_ssl in Apache config file
Uncomment rewrite_module in Apache config file
Uncomment socache_shmcb_module in Apache config file
Check that httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file is not commented out
Uncomment httpd-ssl.conf in Apache config file
Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$contentToAdd = @"
RewriteEngine On
RewriteCond %{HTTPS} off
RewriteRule (.*) https://%{HTTP_HOST}%{REQUEST_URI} [R=301,L]
"@
$fileContents = Get-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf"
$fileContents[211] = $fileContents[211] -replace '^',$contentToAdd
Set-Content "C:\\Apache24\\conf\\httpd.conf" -Value $fileContents

block.name: Enable forwarding for HTTP to HTTPS
block.win_shell:
$webname = "{{ prj_user }}_root"
$rulename = $webname + ' HTTP to HTTPS'
$inbound = '(.*)'
$outbound = "https://{HTTP_HOST}{REQUEST_URI}"
$site = "IIS:\Sites\$webname"
$root = 'system.webServer/rewrite/rules'
$filter = "{0}/rule[@name='{1}']" -f $root, $rulename
$input = "{HTTPS}"
$pattern = "^OFF$"
#Match URL
Add-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter $root -name '.' -value @{name=$rulename; patterSyntax='Regular Expressions'; stopProcessing='True'}
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/match" -name 'url' -value $inbound
#Conditions -> Logical Grouping
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/conditions" -name '.' -value @{input=$input; matchType='0'; pattern=$pattern; ignoreCase='True'; negate='False'}
#Action
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'type' -value 'Redirect'
Set-WebConfigurationProperty -PSPath $site -filter "$filter/action" -name 'url' -value $outbound
